articles.title: Sony’s PS5 sales plummet amid price rises and a memory crisis
articles.description:
Sony sold just 1.5 million PS5 consoles in its most recent fourth fiscal quarter, down 46 percent year-over-year. The slump in PS5 sales comes after Sony raised the price of its PS5 consoles twice over the past year, pushing the price of the regular PS5 from $499.99 all the way up to $649.99.
Sony blamed "continued pressures in the global economic landscape," for the price hikes in March, amid an ongoing memory crisis and pressure from the war in Iran. Sony now forecasts that annual gaming revenue will drop six percent, but these forecasts could be impacted by ongoing memory costs. "We plan to base our PS5 hardware sales in FY26 on the volu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices
articles.description:
Nintendo is raising the price of its Switch 2 console globally, "in light of changes in market conditions," and is now forecasting a drop in sales over the next year. Starting September 1st, the Switch 2 will cost $499.99 in the US, up from its current $449.99 price. 
At the same time, prices will also increase by $50 in Canada ($679.99, up from $629.99) and €40 in Europe, bringing it to €499.99 (about $587). The price increases in Japan go into effect sooner, on May 25th, and impact a greater range of Switch products. The Switch 2 will increase from ¥49,980 (about $318) to ¥59,980 (about $382), with similar increases being applied to the o …

Israel Tightens Grip on Gaza as Deadlock With Hamas Persists
articles.description: Israel has expanded its control of Gazan territory and is considering more intense military action, further squeezing the war-torn enclave.

articles.title: Elderly woman killed in staged road accident for robbery in Bengaluru; five arrested
articles.description: In a “cinematic-style” plan, the accused intentionally rammed a motorcycle into the victim, and then admitted her to a hospital. Meanwhile, one of the accomplices stole her house keys in a an attempt to commit theft.

articles.title: UAE reports drone and missile attack as Iran war ceasefire is challenged
articles.description: The Iran war's shaky ceasefire was further strained on Friday as the United Arab Emirates responded to a missile and drone strikes.

topStories.title: Bear kills woman in Japan, 2 more fatal attacks suspected
topStories.description: Japan confirmed the first fatal bear attack of 2026 after a record 13 deaths last year.

topStories.title: Tamil Nadu government formation: CPI, CPI(M) extend unconditional support to TVK; VCK may follow suit
topStories.description: The TVK, with 108 seats, had already secured the support of the five members of the Congress

topStories.title: Pro wrestling star Ben Bishop on changes he'd make to independent scene: 'It's little things'
topStories.description: Ben Bishop opened up about independent wrestling's challenges, from water in locker rooms to show length, ahead of ACW Reckoning in Poughkeepsie, New York.

topStories.title: WATCH:  CDC classifies outbreak as 'Level 3' emergency
topStories.description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention activated its Emergency Operations Center and classified the hantavirus outbreak as a Level 3 emergency, multiple sources told ABC News.

topStories.title: Olympic gold medalists rip Newsom for California's trans athlete situation ahead of protested track meet
topStories.description: Three-time Olympic gold medalist and attorney Nancy Hogshead speaks out against California Gov. Newsom over trans athletes in girls' track and field.

topStories.title: Military drills on the edge: U.S. and allies test capabilities near Asia's flash points
topStories.description: From drone boats to long-range missiles, the U.S. and its allies tested new military tactics in the Philippines, sharpening deterrence as tensions with China intensify.

topStories.title: WATCH:  Sir David Attenborough turns 100
topStories.description: ABC News' Danny New celebrates the career of the legendary conservationist and broadcaster.

topStories.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: Haters caught on video
topStories.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.

topStories.title: Hantavirus live updates: CDC classifies outbreak as 'Level 3' emergency response
topStories.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

topStories.title: US intel community agreed before war 'Iran wasn't developing a nuclear weapon': ex-counterterrorism chief
topStories.description: Former National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent said the U.S. intelligence community agreed prior to the war that Iran was not developing a nuclear weapon.

topStories.title: 'Changed political circumstances': Kanimozhi writes to Lok Sabha speaker seeking separate seating for DMK MPs after break-up with Congress
topStories.description: DMK MP Kanimozhi has requested Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla to change parliamentary seating arrangements, moving DMK MPs away from Congress. This follows the end of their two-decade alliance in Tamil Nadu after the recent poll results. The DMK accused Congress of betrayal for supporting another party to form the government, warning of widespread electoral consequences.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Schools Face a Crisis as the Number of Children Drops
dailyNews.description: With fewer students, many public school districts are confronting unfilled classrooms, and hard choices about school closures.

dailyNews.title: DR MARC SIEGEL: Hantavirus cruise outbreak is alarming but fear is spreading faster than facts
dailyNews.description: Dr. Marc Siegel separates hantavirus fear from facts after the MV Hondius cruise ship outbreak involving the rare Andes strain in Argentina.

dailyNews.title: Israeli police say Iran using WhatsApp, Facebook, blackmail to recruit spies as latest attempt foiled
dailyNews.description: Iran allegedly uses WhatsApp, Facebook, and blackmail to recruit Israeli spies, with payments ranging from $21 to $300,000 across various networks.

dailyNews.title: Trump Calls Iran Strikes a ‘Trifle,’ and the Latest on the Hantavirus Outbreak
dailyNews.description: Plus, the Friday news quiz.

dailyNews.title: Ships are paying millions more for fuel at L.A., Long Beach ports. The costs won't stay there
dailyNews.description: Shipping companies are imposing fuel surcharges and avoiding expensive routes as the cost for container ship fuel rises amid the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Volcano erupts in Indonesia, killing at least 3 hikers, police say
dailyNews.description: Three hikers in an off-limits area died in an eruption of Indonesia's Mount Dukono volcano, police said.

dailyNews.title: Prices are up, but Mother's Day still means brunch
dailyNews.description: It's the biggest day for America's restaurants, and one of the biggest for flower sales. Despite anxieties over rising gas prices, people are ready to splurge to celebrate.

dailyNews.title: FBI’s lack of progress on Israeli killing of journalist ‘troubling’: CPJ
dailyNews.description: The CPJ says the 'lack of concrete progress' in the FBI investigation represents a failure by the US government.

dailyNews.title: US, Iran clash in Hormuz as war escalates: What happened, why it matters
dailyNews.description: A ceasefire between the US and Iran has been in place since April 8. Both sides are yet to agree on a peace deal.

dailyNews.title: Jobs report set to show hiring as Iran war took hold
dailyNews.description: The war continues to drive up gas prices, threatening a drag on the economy.

dailyNews.title: Apparent bear attack kills hiker in Montana's Glacier National Park
dailyNews.description: The body of a hiker killed in apparent bear attack has been found in n Glacier National Park in Montana, park officials say.

dailyNews.title: Anti-woke Vivek Ramaswamy confronts racism in his run for Ohio governor
dailyNews.description: Vivek Ramaswamy built a political brand casting racism as an obsession of Democrats. As a Republican running for Ohio governor, he’s facing racism on the right.

topStories.title: Trump Calls Iran Strikes a ‘Trifle,’ and the Latest on the Hantavirus Outbreak
topStories.description: Plus, the Friday news quiz.

topStories.title: European countries emerge as NATO leaders as U.S. role recedes
topStories.description: President Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before launching strikes on Iran has inflamed tensions and is putting new urgency on rethinking the alliance.

topStories.title: Starmer’s Labour suffer huge losses as hard-right Reform gains in U.K. elections
topStories.description: Early results Friday from nationwide elections in Britain suggested a historic drubbing for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party and sweeping gains for hard-right Reform U.K., led by Trump ally Nigel Farage.

topStories.title: Trump says ceasefire still intact after burst of violence with Iran
topStories.description: The attacks cast fresh doubt on efforts by Washington and Tehran to reach a negotiated settlement that would end hostilities.

topStories.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
topStories.description: President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S.

topStories.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

topStories.title: China Sees a ‘Giant With a Limp’ as U.S. Drains Weapons on Iran War
topStories.description: America’s ability to deter China in a war over Taiwan is weakened, Chinese analysts say, giving Beijing leverage in an upcoming summit with President Trump.

topStories.title: U.S. launches "self-defense strikes" on Iran, says warships came under fire
topStories.description: As President Trump again voiced optimism that Iran will "make a deal" to end the war, Tehran declared itself the regulator of Strait of Hormuz shipping.

topStories.title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.

topStories.title: Mail-a-handgun: Trump administration pushes to allow firearms to be delivered by USPS
topStories.description: The Trump administration is pushing the Unites States Postal Service to allow people to send concealable handguns in the mail after the Department of Justice declared a 99-year-old ban on the practice unconstitutional.

topStories.title: Trade Court Rules Trump’s 10% Global Tariff Is Illegal
topStories.description: A panel of federal judges found that President Trump could not legally impose the tariff on most imports.

topStories.title: Trump Reversed Hormuz Plan After Saudis Denied Airspace Access
topStories.description: Saudi Arabia’s refusal of support suggests that President Trump’s unpredictable approach to Iran has strained ties with one of his closest allies in the Middle East.

dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia’s refusal of support suggests that President Trump’s unpredictable approach to Iran has strained ties with one of his closest allies in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Round one of Iran fight went to the US military. But ending things is much harder
dailyNews.description: Trump cited the War Powers Resolution to declare the Iran conflict over, but Iranian attacks on U.S. ships during Project Freedom tell a different story.

dailyNews.title: Inside Washington’s legal gold rush under Trump, as regulatory battles drive demand for lawyers
dailyNews.description: Trump era legal warfare is booming in Washington as investigations, indictments, impeachments, media lawsuits, and appeals drive nonstop demand for attorneys.

dailyNews.title: Rubio Meets Meloni as U.S.-Italy Relations Strained and Trump’s Attacks on Pope
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio flew to Rome this week after an unexpected spat between President Trump and Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy, once one of the president’s best friends in Europe.

dailyNews.title: A Very American Controversy at the Venicle Biennale
dailyNews.description: Trump has taken an active role in the arts in his second term, which may be evident in the work on display at the Venice Biennale — depending on how you look at it.

dailyNews.title: Accused WHCD shooter seeks to disqualify Pirro, Blanche because they attended event
dailyNews.description: Attorneys for accused White House Correspondents' Dinner shooter Cole Allen asked a judge to disqualify Jeanine Pirro and other senior Justice Department leaders from the case because they were present during the incident.

dailyNews.title: U.S. trade court rules against Trump's 10% tariffs
dailyNews.description: The tariffs were put in place in February, days after the Supreme Court struck down President Trump's previous round of sweeping "Liberation Day" tariffs.

dailyNews.title: AAPIs more likely than others to say recent Trump policies negatively impacted them: study
dailyNews.description: According to a new study from the Asian American Foundation, Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders are more likely than other Americans to say that recent federal policy changes have negatively impacted their communities. Norman Chen, its CEO, joins "The Daily Report" with more.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge finds DOGE's elimination of humanities grants "unlawful"
dailyNews.description: Three of the nation's major scholarly groups challenged the Trump administration's cuts to humanities grants.

dailyNews.title: Trump asked about focus on renovations during war in Iran
dailyNews.description: During a visit to inspect the new renovations to the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, President Trump was asked about his focus on construction projects in Washington D.C. during an ongoing war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices fall below $100 as Trump insists ceasefire still intact after U.S.-Iran exchange fire
dailyNews.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Strait of Hormuz, raising fresh fears that the fragile ceasefire between the two countries was unraveling.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
